title: You Deleted Everything and AWS Is Still Charging You
summary: AWS Developers provides a cleanup checklist for managing residual charges after deleting cloud resources, identifying hidden costs from RDS snapshots, EBS volumes, elastic IPs, and NAT gateways. The guidance includes setting up billing alarms to prevent unexpected charges.
